title: Dara Ó Briain: Re:Creation
full_description: One of Ireland's finest live comedians is back doing his favourite thing: standing in a theatre, telling stories and creating madness with the audience. Re:Creation is a major new tour covering personal stories — including his continued search for his birth father — alongside his signature fast-paced observational comedy and crowd work. Follows the UK Comedy Tour of the Year 2023, So, Where Were We?
ai_summary: Dara Ó Briain's new tour — featuring personal stories about his search for his birth father alongside the crowd-work and observational comedy that made So, Where Were We? UK Tour of the Year — played two sold-out nights in Amsterdam.
